data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Equipment check for classroom tech', but the evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the actual equipment status or functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for an equipment check, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the status or functionality of classroom tech equipment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add equipment status check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the operational status of classroom tech equipment.
